name: Helen Mccully's Cranberry Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Process the cranberries and orange in 2 batches until evenly chopped, but not too fine.
2. Transfer to a bowl.
3. Add the sugar and Grand Marnier (or bourbon) and mix well.
4. Taste and add more sugar if desired.
5. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
NOTE:
If you prefer a tart cranberry dish, try using less sugar than the full cup – taste and adjust to your liking.
